title: FaunaCraft Enhanced
description: Enhance your FaunaCraft experience with these optional mods!
body:
**Improve the immersiveness and optimization of your game in one cohesive package!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rReRMSOlQRg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Immersion
New ambient sounds, diversified footstep noises, and realistic audio physics make the game incredibly immersive. Caves have reverb, sounds coming from the other side of a wall are more muffled, etc.

Rain and snow particles are more varied, and some new weather-related particles are in here too! This includes dust storms in desert biomes, and subtle mist in moist biomes.

## Optimization
Take advantage of top-of-the-line game optimization mods like Sodium and Lithium while still having the ability to use shaders if you desire. Basically your game = run better.
